Title: [VCST-5073] currentCustomerAddresses — id Filter Returns Single Matching Address
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated. Queries currentCustomerAddresses without filter first to capture an existing address id, then re-queries with that id. SCHEMA NOTE: the "id" arg was added by VCST-5073 (Xapi 3.1007.0+) and is NOT present in the 2026-05-06 schema snapshot — run scripts/graphql-runner.ts --refresh-schema before first execution.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=list_all] errors[] empty
[DATA label=list_all] data.currentCustomerAddresses.items is non-null
[ERRORS label=filter_by_id] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=filter_by_id] data.currentCustomerAddresses.totalCount = 1
[DATA label=filter_by_id] data.currentCustomerAddresses.items.0.id = {{ADDR_ID}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP] captured ADDR_ID from list_all; filter_by_id returns exactly that record
Failure_Signals: list_all errors[] non-empty; ADDR_ID not captured (user has no addresses); filter_by_id returns 0 or >1 items; id mismatch; DV-008 on "id" arg (schema not yet refreshed)

Title: [VCST-5073] currentCustomerAddresses — Non-Existent id Returns Empty List
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated. Queries currentCustomerAddresses with an all-zeros GUID — expects totalCount=0 and items=[], no errors and no HTTP 500.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=no_match] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=no_match] data.currentCustomerAddresses.totalCount = 0
[DATA label=no_match] data.currentCustomerAddresses.items is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Empty items array returned gracefully; no HTTP 500; resolver does not throw on unknown id
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on valid GUID-format id; HTTP 500; totalCount > 0 (wrong record returned); items null

Title: [VCST-5073] currentCustomerAddresses — No id Filter Returns Full List (Regression)
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER authenticated. Regression guard: currentCustomerAddresses WITHOUT id filter must still return all addresses (the new id arg is optional and must not affect default no-filter behavior).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=list_nofilter] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=list_nofilter] data.currentCustomerAddresses.totalCount >= 0
[DATA label=list_nofilter] data.currentCustomerAddresses.items is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Response shape identical to pre-VCST-5073 baseline
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on no-filter call (regression introduced by new arg); items null

Title: [VCST-4835] newsArticles — sort publishDate:desc Returns Descending Order
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC role — newsArticles does not require authentication. Store must have at least 2 published news articles. Sort arg is a plain String (format "field:direction"). SCHEMA NOTE: NewsArticleType field list not in snapshot — fields id/title/publishDate assumed present.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=desc_sort] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=desc_sort] data.newsArticles.totalCount >= 2
[DATA label=desc_sort] data.newsArticles.items.0.publishDate is non-null
[DATA label=desc_sort] data.newsArticles.items.1.publishDate is non-null
[DATA label=desc_sort] data.newsArticles.items.0.publishDate >= data.newsArticles.items.1.publishDate
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Bug VCST-4835: before fix, sort was ignored. The >= assertion on ISO-8601 dates fails if fix is regressed.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; totalCount < 2 (insufficient seeded articles); items.0.publishDate < items.1.publishDate (fix regressed); DV-008 on publishDate field

Title: [VCST-4835] newsArticles — sort publishDate:asc Returns Ascending Order
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC role. Companion to GQL-127 verifying both sort directions.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=asc_sort] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=asc_sort] data.newsArticles.totalCount >= 2
[DATA label=asc_sort] data.newsArticles.items.0.publishDate is non-null
[DATA label=asc_sort] data.newsArticles.items.1.publishDate is non-null
[DATA label=asc_sort] data.newsArticles.items.0.publishDate <= data.newsArticles.items.1.publishDate
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Ascending sort produces oldest article first; inverse of GQL-127.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; totalCount < 2; items.0.publishDate > items.1.publishDate (asc sort returning newest first); DV-008 on publishDate

Title: [VCST-4835] newsArticles — No sort Arg Returns Structural Integrity
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC role. Calls newsArticles with no sort argument — verifies the query succeeds and returns structurally valid articles. Default order is implementation-defined; test asserts only structural invariants.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=nosort] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=nosort] data.newsArticles.totalCount >= 0
[DATA label=nosort] data.newsArticles.items is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] When totalCount >= 1, items[0].id is non-null and items[0].publishDate is non-null
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on call without sort; HTTP 500; items null; DV-008 on id/title/publishDate

Title: [VCST-5069] xCMS pages Post-Reindex Health Check
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC role. Verifies xCMS pages query returns a non-null, non-error result for B2B-store after a search index rebuild. Bug VCST-5069 symptom: pages erroring or returning empty after reindex.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=list_pages_health] errors[] empty
[DATA label=list_pages_health] data.pages is non-null
[COUNT label=list_pages_health] data.pages.totalCount >= 0
[DATA label=list_pages_health] data.pages.items is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] After search index rebuild verify same totalCount as pre-rebuild
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty after reindex; pages.items null or empty when CMS pages exist; HTTP 500; totalCount drops to 0 post-rebuild

Title: [VCST-5069] xCMS page Single-Item Round-Trip Post-Reindex
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC role. Captures pages.items[0].id then resolves full page object. Verifies that individual page nodes are resolvable after reindex.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=list_pages_seed] errors[] empty
[DATA label=list_pages_seed] data.pages.items is non-null
[ERRORS label=one_page_post_reindex] errors[] empty
[DATA label=one_page_post_reindex] data.page is non-null
[DATA label=one_page_post_reindex] data.page.id = {{CAPTURED_PAGE_ID}}
[DATA label=one_page_post_reindex] data.page.name is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] page.id and name resolve correctly after reindex
Failure_Signals: page returns null for a valid captured id; id mismatch with CAPTURED_PAGE_ID; HTTP 500 on page(id) call

Title: [VCST-5069] xCMS builderPage Smoke After Reindex
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC role. Queries builderPage(storeId, pageId) with a zero-GUID probe — expects graceful null or graceful errors[], never HTTP 500. Any 500 or schema error after reindex indicates Builder.io CMS GraphQL surface broken.
Assertions: [DATA label=builder_probe] data is non-null or errors[] is non-empty
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] If env has seeded Builder.io content, replace pageId probe with a real captured id
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; stack trace or schema error in errors[]; resolver panic on Builder.io content after reindex

Title: [VCST-4173] xCatalog products term_facets Present After FilteredBrowsing Migration
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC role. Verifies term_facets[] is populated after VCST-4173 migrated FilteredBrowsing config from DynamicProperties to Store Settings. Uses active B2B virtual catalog root 9238c387-d779-40cb-b27d-5496a670a924 (per feedback_graphql_products_filter memory).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=products_term_facets] errors[] empty
[DATA label=products_term_facets] data.products is non-null
[DATA label=products_term_facets] data.products.term_facets is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Confirm same facet groups appear in Admin > Catalog > Store > FilteredBrowsing blade as before migration
Failure_Signals: term_facets[] null or empty after migration (config lost); facet count drops to 0 where it was >0 pre-migration; HTTP 500; DV-008 on facet field names

Title: [VCST-4173] xCatalog products range_facets Present After FilteredBrowsing Migration
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC role. Verifies range_facets[] is populated when a price.USD facet is passed, after VCST-4173 migrated FilteredBrowsing from DynamicProperties to Store Settings. Range aggregation config must survive migration.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=products_range_facets] errors[] empty
[DATA label=products_range_facets] data.products is non-null
[DATA label=products_range_facets] data.products.range_facets is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] range_facets may be empty if no price range aggregation is configured — verify Admin blade first
Failure_Signals: range_facets[] null after migration (range config not written to Store Settings); facet argument rejected; HTTP 500
